DECISION_1: THESIS — Strong steelman on decision 1.
DECISION_2: ANTI_THESIS — Alternative is better scoped on decision 2.
DECISION_3: ANTI_THESIS — Clearer failure mode on decision 3.
DECISION_4: ANTI_THESIS — Less risk of regression on decision 4.
DECISION_5: ANTI_THESIS — Smaller surface on decision 5.
